sample_reviews.author: James H
sample_reviews.text: Anchor Plumbing sorted our burst pipe quickly and professionally. Would highly recommend to anyone in Birmingham.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Fantastic service from start to finish. Arrived on time, fixed the boiler issue same day. Great value for money.

sample_reviews.author: David T
sample_reviews.text: Very reliable and honest. Gave a clear quote upfront and stuck to it. Will definitely use again.

brand.usp: Anchor Plumbing delivers fast, reliable plumbing services across Birmingham with transparent pricing and no hidden costs. From emergency callouts to full bathroom installations, we're the local team you can trust.
brand.hero_headline: Birmingham's Trusted Plumber, Ready When You Need
brand.about_paragraph: I'm the owner of Anchor Plumbing and I've been serving homes and businesses across Birmingham for years. I take pride in offering honest, high-quality plumbing work at fair prices, whether it's a small leak or a full central heating installation. When you call Anchor Plumbing, you get a tradesman who turns up on time, does the job right, and leaves your home clean and tidy.
